programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A chiropodist, two part-time gardeners and a woman who works on projects in between the school run are todays investors. Theyve bought property in Bullbridge in Derbyshire, Newcastle under Lyme in Staffordshire and Wolverhampton in the West Midlands under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts follows the progress of a couple developing a chalet bungalow in Drakelowe in Staffordshire for their family, while Lucy Alexander talks to a young entrepreneur with grand plans for a three-bed semi in Croydon in London. programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: What lies behind the door of number 27 The Hill? A routine `domestic call out to the house leads to a policemans murder, the prime suspect grievously injured and a shocking discovery. However, the suspect is in a coma, and the ambitious DS Annie Cabbot wants to know why.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: The suspected murderer Marcus Payne dies without regaining consciousness, but his wife Lucy recovers from the injuries caused by her husband. Banks knows that Payne must have had an accomplice and he decides to take Lucy in for questioning on the grounds of being involved with her husbands crimes.

programme.title: Hamburger Hill
programme.desc: An emotional and harrowing re-creation of the battle to secure Hill 937 in the Ashau Valley during the Vietnam War. The film follows a platoon through eleven agonising assaults over a ten-day period, suffering rivers of mud, stifling heat and driving rain as they battle against a well-entrenched enemy. This searing account of one battle can be seen as a microcosm of the Vietnam War itself.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole, Simon OBrien and Max McMurdo travel across the UK to find unique items lost in peoples homes to fix up for a profit. This episode features 17th-century wooden beams.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Dan and Mardi Leonard welcome the others to their Brighton BandB, Guest and the City. The guests have mixed reactions to the contemporary decor and stained glass windows. Alan and Jane think the room isnt user friendly, Dubliner Phil is confused by the furniture, whilst Sarah and Jean-Pierre decry the lack of a shower curtain.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Phil Kiernan, entrepreneur and proud owner of the Farmers Boy Inn in Gloucestershire welcomes his guests and quickly introduces them to his latest business venture: pies. Alan and Jane take centre stage in a pie-making competition as their kitchen bickering entertains the group. Before breakfast the next morning the group work up an appetite on the bouncy castle.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Alan and Jane welcome their first ever guests to their brand-new purpose built hotel boat, the Geanna. On arrival the guests enjoy the novelty factor, but Dan and Mardi think that space is too tight, while Jean-Pierre and Sarah are concerned about privacy. After inspecting their cabins, the Geanna embarks on her maiden voyage up the Thames.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Connoisseurs Sarah Langford and Jean-Pierre Kujawa have been running Sentry Mead, their 11-bedroom, five-star silver BandB for the past six years. Their guests arrive with high expectations, but Janes high hopes are dashed by the mugs, Dan and Mardi dont like their shower mat, and Phils not keen on the towels.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its the final day and the BandB hosts gather for one last time to find out how much theyve been paid. Unfortunately, some of the hosts find their emotions running away with them.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First to host in Lichfield, Staffs is business consultant James Herbert, who has high hopes for his complex Italian menu. He also has some fun photo frolics planned. His guests are 22-year-old football coach Tim Travers, 30-year-old sales assistant and all-round party boy JP Goodyear-Martinez, 38-year-old businesswoman Amanda Smith, and straight-talking retired mental health nurse Ronnie Imlah.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ronnie Imlah hosts in Lichfield, with a menu inspired by dishes eaten at friends parties. With a revelation about Ronnies past leaving guests in shock, JP Goodyear-Martinez and Amanda Smith argue over plastic surgery.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: JP Goodyear-Martinez hosts in Lichfield, treating his guests to a mix of Jamaican food, tight lycra outfits and a drag queen. James Herberts rendition of `Bohemian Rhapsody doesnt go down too well with Ronnie.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Football coach Tim Travers is determined to prove his kitchen skills despite never having cooked before. Luckily, his mum is on the other end of the phone to help out every step of the way with his American-themed menu.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final night in Lichfield and there are high hopes for recruitment consultant Amanda Smiths evening, with her guests expecting a well-executed and sophisticated menu. An accident at the table has the guests in hysterics and straight-talking Ronnie describing it as her worst nightmare.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: This competition starts at The Old Stables, Somerset, where Finnish born Nina Dodd and husband Andy welcome guests to their Scandinavian style accommodation.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Morris Cockman runs Rigsbys Guest House in Hertford. Morriss tattoos have previously raised eyebrows, while his attempt to entertain his guests at a local zoo isnt a hit with everyone.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: David and Erica Hensley are the owners of The Fairway in Blackpool. The couple bring some classic Blackpool fun to the mix as the group take on some local zombies in a horror walk.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Robin Hughes runs the converted Dent Station in the Yorkshire Dales. Robin organises a butchery competition and high end grub nearby, where a few home truths about the group dynamic are revealed.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet for one last time to find out what theyve been paid and confront their critics. Some of Robins petty marks over the week are thrown to the group for discussion.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In Edinburgh, Kirstie helps Sadia and Sohail break the shackles of flat-living, while Phils with Freya and Elliot, who are set on exclusive enclaves - in a fast-moving market.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: In Edinburgh, Gary and Bill are torn over their four-bed home set in the grounds of a graveyard. Bill loves its quirkiness, but Gary hates the higgledy-piggledy layout.

programme.title: Bill Baileys Australian Adventure
programme.desc: Comedian Bill Bailey explores the epic, extraordinarily beautiful state of Western Australia - from stunning beaches to tugboat racing its a once-in-a-lifetime voyage down under.

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Limboland
programme.desc: Limboland is a place where we find the gaps in life. From a fantastically downbeat version of Happy Birthday - via a hilarious tale of a disastrous family trip to see the Northern Lights - to a heart-rending country and western ballad on the nature of love, Bill explores our expectations of happiness with his trademark wit and musicality.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Arriving at St Georges by air ambulance after a car crash is 91-year-old Cyril. While Cyril awaits further reports and examinations, his wife Betty talks about the strength of their 68-year marriage.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Lawrence, whos 26, is rushed to St Georges after being hit by a car while on a night out. He was bleeding from his ears and was put into an induced coma at the scene.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Hartlepool the heli-medics are tasked with treating a man hit by a train. Cyclist Trevor suffers serious injuries after a collision with a car.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Arriving at St Georges by air ambulance after a car crash is 91-year-old Cyril. While Cyril awaits further reports and examinations, his wife Betty talks about the strength of their 68-year marriage.

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: A Killers Mistake

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Shirley Merritt is devoted to her family, especially her youngest son, Richard, but he wants to have the good life by any means possible. When bad choices lead to a prison sentence, Richard makes a deadly decision, and his secret is exposed.

programme.title: American Monster

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: A house fire, resulting in the death of two children, sees the parents as suspects, and an elderly lady is the victim of an attack.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: In Wisconsin, a burglar in handcuffs escapes police custody in a squad car and goes into hiding; in Oklahoma, a simple conversation ends up in a shoot-out at a gas station with an officer down.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Connie Hevener and Carolyn Hevener Perry are brutally killed while working at an ice cream shop.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Donna Fowlers disappearance isnt her first, but its her last. Years later, Stacy Belcher vanishes too. Two families face the horror of a long-time monster.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: When Marlene Major disappears in 1980, her family suspects she ran off to escape her abusive husband. Her daughter is determined to learn the truth and seek justice for her mother.

programme.title: Police: Suspect No. 1
programme.desc: In Norfolk, an otherwise unassuming summer evening is shaken by an armed robbery. A vehicle is stolen and innocent people are shot.

programme.title: Police: Suspect No. 1
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Burgess of Norwich CID has a problem as the number of home burglaries has rocketed. Looking at the evidence, officers suspect that one man is potentially responsible for a large part of the spike in residential crime.

programme.title: Police: Suspect No. 1
programme.desc: After a raid on a cannabis factory, nine people are arrested and it is up to the team to get to the bottom of which role each suspect played.

programme.title: Police: Suspect No. 1
programme.desc: The team in Norwich gather evidence about a single-punch attack that has left a man seriously injured, and there are no willing witnesses.

programme.title: Murderous Minds: Dennis Nilsen
programme.desc: Dennis Andrew Nilsen was a Scottish serial killer and necrophiliac who murdered at least 12 young men and boys in London between 1978 and 1983.

programme.title: Jack the Ripper: Londons Most Notorious Killer
programme.desc: Unmasking Jack the Ripper and his evil deeds with a presentation of both factual evidence and conspiracy theories.

programme.title: The Manson Murders
programme.desc: The Manson Family, led by Charles Manson, committed a set of crimes that terrified the world and brought the flower power movement to a halt. Charles Milles Manson was an American criminal and musician who led the Manson Family, a cult based in California.

programme.title: Final 24
programme.desc: 18 April 1993, and one of the most notorious religious leaders in the United States, David Koresh, along with 83 of his followers, has been trapped inside a Waco, Texas, compound for over 50 days, unwilling to surrender and surrounded by the police authorities. The siege is the longest modern-day standoff in American law enforcement history. In 24 hours, however, it will all be over, and Koresh and 73 others will be dead.

programme.title: Cult of Personality
programme.sub-title: Jim Jones and The Peoples Temple
programme.desc: Jim Jones, a charismatic but tyrannical preacher, leads his followers into the remote commune of Jonestown, Guyana.

programme.title: Cult of Personality
programme.sub-title: Charles Manson and The Manson Family
programme.desc: Charles Manson, a former con man turned guru of a hippie commune isolated in the Californian desert, has followers who are willing to kill for him.

programme.title: Cult of Personality
programme.sub-title: Sun Myung Moon and The Moonies
programme.desc: Moonies are told that they are on a mission to save humanity, but in reality, they are just building an empire for their Messiah, Sun Myung Moon, the all powerful reverend of the Unification Church.

programme.title: Cult of Personality
programme.sub-title: David Koresh and The Branch of Davidians
programme.desc: David Koresh, the so-called Sinful Messiah of Waco, Texas, prepares his followers for a battle with the federal government, but he also sleeps with whomever he chooses, including preteen girls.

programme.title: Cult of Personality
programme.desc: At the border of Utah and Arizona, a remote theocratic community has been thriving for decades. They live in full obedience to a spiritual leader by the name of Warren Jeffs, the prophet of the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Cult of Personality
programme.sub-title: David Berg and The Children Of God
programme.desc: We meet some of the survivors and a former disciple of David Berg. This end-of-the-world preachers vision of heaven on earth included the sexual abuse of children.

programme.title: Manic: Cult Leader, Scam Artists, Prophet and Father Of Fifteen
programme.desc: Kalina Bertin sets out to find the truth about their father - cult leader and scam artist.

programme.title: Manson
programme.desc: A chronicle of Charles Mansons life leading up to the orchestration of the Tate an LaBianca murders.

programme.title: Mansons Missing Victims
programme.desc: Stories about people who disappeared when they attempted to leave the Barker Ranch.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Seemingly normal couple Karla Hornolka and Paul Bernardo murdered two teenage girls together, but would their dedication to one another last through the trial?

programme.title: The Boneyard
programme.desc: Chilling documentary charting a brutal real life tale of kidnapping, enslavement and murder. Find out how investigators tracked down a malicious murderer and explore the extensive trial that followed.

programme.title: The Manson Murders

programme.title: Giant Sea Serpent: Meet The Myth

programme.title: Of Shark and Man

A love letter to the worlds most feared predator, in which the shark is the hero.

programme.title: Animal Armoury

programme.title: Animal Armoury

programme.title: Baboon Bandits

programme.title: Animal Armoury

programme.title: Discovering Film

programme.title: Portrait Artist of the Year
programme.desc: Who is the best portrait artist in the UK and Ireland? Thats the question that this programme tries to answer. The show, with its judging panel, travels to London, Glasgow, Dublin and Cardiff to hold competitions to find each citys top portrait artist. Those four artists then travel to Paris for further inspiration and development, producing one further work during their two days in Frances capital city. The four finalists work is then displayed in Londons National Portrait Gallery for a period. In addition to being considered for further projects by the gallery, the winner is awarded a £10,000 commission to produce a portrait of author Hilary Mantel that will become part of The British Librarys permanent art collection.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Cara hires safecracker Sam to get back her confiscated jewels, but when she insists on joining him on the job, it looks like Sam might be making the biggest mistake of his career.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A rich, lonely American comes to London to find his long lost family to share his life and fortune. Unfortunately, chance meetings with his flatmates have disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When a pricey piece of art is stolen, its gallery owner gets his girlfriend to make copies of the painting to sell, but did the work ever leave the building in the first place?

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Freed from prison, a thief (Steven Hill) leads his partner (Steve Brodie) to the mine shaft where he hid their loot.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: About to be executed for a crime he didnt commit, a man (Harry Guardino) decides to write his side of the story. With Hugh Marlowe.

programme.title: Stories From the National Portrait Gallery
programme.desc: Kate Bryans exploration takes her to the 8th and 9th centuries, and she discovers how one invention - the camera - changed portraiture forever.

programme.desc: Explores the lives, works, and secrets of some of the most brilliant spy authors in literature.

programme.desc: Punctuated with specially-filmed, dramatic vignettes, Prince and his band bring his Grammy-nominated album "Sign o the Times" to life in one of the greatest concert films ever made, capturing Prince at the peak of his musical powers.

programme.title: Discovering Music
programme.desc: Friends and fans of legendary British rock band Queen discuss their admiration for the award-winning quartet and reflect on their remarkable career and enduring hit songs.

programme.title: Brendan Gleesons Farewell to Hughess
programme.desc: To some it was an unassuming pub on a side street in Dublins city centre, to musicians, dancers, singers and listeners, Hughes was a mecca of traditional Irish music for more than 35 years.

programme.title: Brendan Gleesons Farewell to Hughess
programme.desc: To some it was an unassuming pub on a side street in Dublins city centre, to musicians, dancers, singers and listeners, Hughes was a mecca of traditional Irish music for more than 35 years.

programme.title: Life and Rhymes
programme.desc: For the final episode in the series, issues such as life choices, mental health and identity are explored in heartfelt performances.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Beginning in ancient China, the ruthless Emperor Han will stop at nothing to gain control of the region. Many years on, in the 1940s, Hans tomb is discovered, and Rick OConnell and his wife Evelyn get drawn into a plot to resurrect the emperor and restore him to power.

programme.title: Long Gone Heroes
programme.desc: Gunner is a special forces soldier who returns to the field of battle to save his kidnapped niece in South America. He and his team soon discover that her disappearance is part of a corrupt private operation that hits way too close to home.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 5
programme.desc: In Rio de Janeiro, ex-con Dom Torretto and ex-cop Brian OConner join forces against a corrupt businessman who wants them both dead.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Journalist Eddie Brock is trying to take down Carlton Drake, the notorious and brilliant founder of the Life Foundation. While investigating one of Drakes experiments, Eddies body merges with the alien Venom -- leaving him with superhuman strength and power. Twisted, dark and fueled by rage, Venom tries to control the new and dangerous abilities that Eddie finds so intoxicating.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Under the watchful eye of mentor Tony Stark, high school student Peter Parker starts to embrace his newfound identity as Spider-Man. When the evil Vulture emerges to cause havoc, everything Peter loves is in jeopardy.

programme.title: Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: Perseus travels the underworld to defeat the evil god Hades, who seeks to overthrow Zeus and bring hell to Earth.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity, and inspired by Supermans selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists newfound ally Diana Prince to face an even greater threat. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to recruit a team to stand against this newly-awakened enemy. Despite the formation of an unprecedented league of heroes in Batman, Wonder Woman, Aquaman, Cyborg and the Flash, it may be too late to save the planet from an assault of catastrophic proportions.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Weather scientists Jo and Bill put marital problems aside to track a slew of devastating tornadoes raging through Oklahoma and stay one step ahead of their better-equipped but arrogant rivals. They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: A group of petty criminals plan to rig a major traffic jam to divert attention from their bank heist.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: To clear his criminal record a former LA cop must infiltrate the Miami street-racing scene to set up a drug baron. Burning rubber all over the city with his ex-con friend, he attempts to deliver the crook to the FBI without crashing and being blown to pieces in one of the many explosions.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Street-racing sequel following an adrenaline-junkie automobile addict who narrowly avoids jail by agreeing to move in with his father in Tokyo. However, he soon discovers the thrill of the local underground drift racing scene and unwittingly becomes involved with the Yakuza.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Street-racing sequel following an adrenaline-junkie automobile addict who narrowly avoids jail by agreeing to move in with his father in Tokyo. However, he soon discovers the thrill of the local underground drift racing scene and unwittingly becomes involved with the Yakuza.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: Into the Wonderwoods
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Angelo, an aspiring explorer, is left behind by his distracted parents at a rest stop. He then ventures into a forest inhabited by strange, wonderful creatures to find them.

programme.title: Extinct
programme.desc: Op and Ed accidentally time-travel from the Galapagos Islands in 1835 to present-day Shanghai. They make their way through the city in confusion and make the horrifying discovery that the species to which they belong became extinct shortly after.

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: Maurice is a streetwise ginger cat who comes up with a money-making scam by befriending a group of self-taught talking rats. When Maurice and the rodents meet a bookworm called Malicia, their little con soon goes down the drain.

programme.title: Fireheart
programme.desc: In New York City in 1932, women are not allowed to be firefighters. When the citys firemen disappear in mysterious fires, Georgia Nolan sees a golden opportunity. She disguises herself as Joe and joins a team of improvised firemen.

programme.title: Open Season
programme.desc: Stranded in the wilderness, a mule deer and a domesticated bear try to make their way back to the safety of a town preserve before a hunter catches them.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: When evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel take Papa Smurf, the Smurfs embark on a mission to the real world to save him. With help from some new friends, they must discover what defines their destiny to save the universe.

programme.title: Into the Wonderwoods
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Angelo, an aspiring explorer, is left behind by his distracted parents at a rest stop. He then ventures into a forest inhabited by strange, wonderful creatures to find them.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Discovering that his most-famous machine is now creating animal/vegetable hybrids, inventor Flint Lockwood and his friends venture forth to save the world from tacodiles, shrimpanzees and other creatures.

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: Maurice is a streetwise ginger cat who comes up with a money-making scam by befriending a group of self-taught talking rats. When Maurice and the rodents meet a bookworm called Malicia, their little con soon goes down the drain.

programme.title: Open Season 2
programme.desc: Elliots way to his wedding with Giselle gets longer when Mr Weenie is kidnapped by a group of pampered pets determined to return him to his owners.

programme.title: Fireheart
programme.desc: In New York City in 1932, women are not allowed to be firefighters. When the citys firemen disappear in mysterious fires, Georgia Nolan sees a golden opportunity. She disguises herself as Joe and joins a team of improvised firemen.

programme.title: Extinct
programme.desc: Op and Ed accidentally time-travel from the Galapagos Islands in 1835 to present-day Shanghai. They make their way through the city in confusion and make the horrifying discovery that the species to which they belong became extinct shortly after.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: Superbad
programme.desc: Two inseparable best friends navigate the last weeks of high school and are invited to a gigantic house party. Together with their nerdy friend, they spend a long day trying to score enough alcohol to supply the party and inebriate two girls in order to kick-start their sex lives before they go off to college. Their quest is complicated after one of them falls in with two inept cops who are determined to show him a good time.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A recently engaged woman becomes obsessed with meeting the grieving widower she heard on a late night radio show. Sam, the widower, receives hundreds of letters following the radio phone-in which was instigated by his son Jonah.

programme.title: Youve Got Mail
programme.desc: Two rival bookstore owners are unaware that they are conducting a secret romance with each other on the Internet. When they discover the truth, they must prevent their business rivalry from interfering with their growing personal intimacy.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones must figure out which of the two men in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Weaving in and out of the love lives of eight loosely inter-related couples. The bachelor Prime Minister falls for his personal assistant, his brother-in-law is flirting with one of his colleagues, a writer heads off to France and pursues an affair with a maid, and an 11-year-old boy asks his father for advice on matters of the heart.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: Risky Business
programme.desc: A normally well-behaved teenager goes wild while his parents are out of town. In charge at his parents smart house, the 17-year-old sees the chance to make a fast buck when the prostitute, on the run from a scary pimp, appears at his door. He takes her in, and, following his schools entrepreneurial teachings, lets her turn the house into a brothel.

programme.desc: A woman undergoes treatment to battle breast cancer while her best friend tries to get pregnant.

programme.title: Boy Meets Boy
programme.desc: Harry has been partying for 48 hours when he meets Johannes on the dance floor of a club in Berlin. With 15 hours until his flight home, Johannes offers to help him print his boarding pass.

programme.desc: A surgeon allows her young colleague to take charge during a surgery. When a mistake occurs, the surgeon finds herself in a difficult situation.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Coach Ken Carter, a controversial high school basketball coach who received national attention when he benched his undefeated team due to their collective poor academic record in 1999. In the face of much criticism, Carter fought to keep his methods, determined to show the boys that they need to rely on more than sports for their futures.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Irreverent spoof about a black sheriff hired by a crooked speculator to drive citizens out of an all-white town which lies in the path of a railroad. The townspeople turn on the inexperienced sheriff, and he is forced to turn to a convict, once the fastest gun in the West, for help.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: An alcoholic millionaire is threatened with losing his inheritance if he does not marry the girl of his parents choosing. Despite his dislike for his prospective bride, he bows to the inevitable only to meet a light-fingered waitress who steals his heart. John Gielgud won an Oscar for his role as Arthurs loyal but outspoken valet.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: A bungling bachelor becomes a last-minute babysitter. Bucks brothers three children are foisted on him when the parents are called away from home indefinitely. Although he seems to be an unsuitable guardian, Buck turns out to have an unexpected knack for parenting, but he must work hard to prove himself, especially when he needs to save his eldest niece from her unsavoury boyfriend.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: Rising temperatures mean that water is getting scarce and the Manzi pack must stand alongside predators to hydrate at a remaining precious water spot, Wekas pack hunts to feed the pups, and the Stork Colony pack thrive against all odds.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: Cabo Pulmo, a tiny ocean community on the shores of Mexicos Sea of Cortez, is home to an extraordinary story of marine recovery. By the mid-1980s, this near-pristine coral reef was all but wiped out - decimated by reckless overfishing. That is, until those same fishermen abandoned their way of life and fought to save what Jacques Cousteau once called the aquarium of the world.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: Agonising over a lost stork pack puppy, tussling with Manzi pups who are sorting their place in the hierarchy, and figuring out noisy-neighbour, both friend and foe. Following a search mission with Julz for the missing Kakuli pack in the Badlands.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: Dodging leopards with the Manzi dogs while they treat themselves to a stolen feast. There is no such luck for the Kakuli pack on the hunt, as theyre foiled by a brave puku antelope. Jules and Simon retreat from charging elephants.

programme.desc: From their time as dangerous adversaries to colonialist hunters to the ever-present and considerable challenges of daily life, for the lion, African elephant, leopard, buffalo and rhino, life isnt easy when youre big in the wild.

programme.desc: As the Victoria gang struggle with lots of new mouths to feed, the Zambai gang must decide whether to let outcasts from outer town in.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: North of the worlds largest freshwater lake lies some of the worlds fiercest terrain: from the rugged ancient landscape of the Canadian Shield and northern forests to stunning vistas of Lake Superior.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve Backshall explores the evolving understanding of whales, how much they have in common with humans, and how recent discoveries could help to better protect them from threats in an increasingly changing world.

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: In Australias remote northwest, discover a land that defies time. "The Kimberley" spans over 400,000 square kilometres of remote tropical wilderness: turquoise coastlines, towering gorges, sandy deserts and sprawling savanna.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: Cabo Pulmo, a tiny ocean community on the shores of Mexicos Sea of Cortez, is home to an extraordinary story of marine recovery. By the mid-1980s, this near-pristine coral reef was all but wiped out - decimated by reckless overfishing. That is, until those same fishermen abandoned their way of life and fought to save what Jacques Cousteau once called the aquarium of the world.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: Agonising over a lost stork pack puppy, tussling with Manzi pups who are sorting their place in the hierarchy, and figuring out noisy-neighbour, both friend and foe. Following a search mission with Julz for the missing Kakuli pack in the Badlands.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: Dodging leopards with the Manzi dogs while they treat themselves to a stolen feast. There is no such luck for the Kakuli pack on the hunt, as theyre foiled by a brave puku antelope. Jules and Simon retreat from charging elephants.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: Stretching more than 700 kilometres through the wilds of Ontario, the Niagara Escarpment Biosphere Reserve begins with the mighty Niagara Falls and winds its way through deep valleys and caves.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Theres big news for one of the chimp groups, and rescued marmoset Jangles summons up the courage to join her new mate Reggie in the outside enclosure.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Vet Nic Masters uses high tech diagnostic equipment to examine health issues in some of the parks smaller primates, including capuchin Louis and patas monkey Penelope.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: Palau is a tiny country with a big story. In 2009, this island nation in the middle of the western Pacific Ocean created the worlds first shark sanctuary to protect more than 100 shark species from reckless overfishing and the brutal practice of commercial shark finning. Then, in 2014, Palau once again led the way. It established the worlds largest marine sanctuary - a no-go zone for foreign commercial fisheries nearly the size of California.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: Following a wild dog hunt with Julz as he catches up with the Manzi pack at a kill and watching for leopards and hyenas as the Kakuli pack takes great risks waiting for the rains to come.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: An emotional Julz says farewell to the dog packs. He discovers the Stork Colony pups hunting guinea fowl and is heartened to find the Kakuli pups feeding on an antelope carcass. The playful Manzi pack corner a tough warthog.

programme.title: Land of Primates
programme.desc: On the verdant island of Zanzibar, off the coast of Tanzania, lives a family of red colobus Monkeys. They are the last of their kind, trapped in a shrinking paradise.

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: There are more species of beetle in the world than any other animal, and few play a role as important as the humble dung beetle. These tiny counterparts to Africas giant plant eaters bring balance to a system that supports life like no other.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Mekong
programme.desc: Following the seasonal ebb and flow of the Mekong through Cambodia.

programme.title: Coral City
programme.desc: Get chills as winter descends, slowing down life on the bustling reef. Meander with reef sharks and octopuses, visit a coral oasis atop an old shipwreck and more.

programme.title: Tales From Zambia
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley, some of the largest animals on earth live side by side. Elephant, giraffe, buffalo, hippo and nile crocodile. They are the heavyweights.

Meanwhile, Bob and Jeanie from Scotland have come to the Lake District in search of peace and solitude and to celebrate their 50th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Irish Railways

programme.title: The Great Train Robbery

programme.title: The Gathering Storm: Life In The War
programme.desc: On 10 May 1941, the Germans launched their deadliest raid of the Blitz. The target was London. By the time it was over, the House of Commons lay in ruins and only Marylebone station was functioning. Cracks began to emerge in the `Blitz Spirit.

programme.title: Fighting the Blue
programme.desc: A study of Hugh Dowding, Commander-In-Chief of Fighter Command during the Battle of Britain, and spiritualist.

programme.title: WWII: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: A look at how mechanised warfare aided Germanys advance into France. The way commando raids, blitzkrieg, mobile desert warfare, and amphibious landings changed warfare.

programme.desc: Unearthing the shocking truth about how a cultured nation at the heart of Europe allowed a monster like Hitler to come to power. This film reveals how the Nazi party was born, and how, by January 1933, Germany voted for a Chancellor who was openly committed to overthrowing democracy.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Despite the B52 bombers and the napalm, the USAF raids in Vietnam achieved nothing. Includes a look at President Johnsons daily target selection and covert US bases.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: John and Vanessa want a garden reminiscent of Oman, the desert kingdom where they first met. The large raised planter right outside the back doors, nicknamed the sarcophagus, is outdated and dominates the garden, and John and Vanessa are desperate for it to go, but they are keen for the materials to be reused to make the most of their £4,000 budget. John loves a fire, and the couple love to entertain, so they need space for an area in which to socialise.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: This time Charlie goes back to Pontefract to see one of the first gardens the team ever built. Originally she and the Rich Brothers saw it under inches of snow, but it was soon turned into a gorgeous nature garden.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and his team take the garden makeover show to Hemel Hempstead to create a garden for an extraordinary family. Like his wife Sabina, Asif Iqbal was born with no hearing. He told the programme about his admiration for Sabina, who has never seen disability as a disadvantage and has received numerous awards for her voluntary charitable work, including Tesco Mum of the Year 2010. Asif himself is also an inspirational force.

programme.title: The Boat That Guy Built
programme.desc: Engineering enthusiast Guy Martin and his best mate Mave decide to give their historic narrowboat a makeover. They learn about the most influential British interior designer of all, William Morris, while trying to stick up wallpaper he originally designed. They then master the fine art of narrowboat painting, and attempt their own version of the traditional decoration of castles and roses.

programme.title: The Boat That Guy Built
programme.desc: Motorcycle racer Guy Martin examines the major inventions of the Industrial Revolution. Guy and Mave decide to show off their renovated boat and all its historic inventions at an end of mission party. They make some party food, learning how to bake a Victoria Sponge, and also commemorate their trip by mastering a 150-year-old camera and trying to sit still for two minutes for a Victorian-style portrait.

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley examines Agatha Christies later life, and discovers how, amid the turbulent social and political change of the 1930s and 40s, newfound personal happiness ushered in a golden age for her writing.

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Dr Lucy Worsley investigates the dark history of our curious relationship with killing, beginning with notorious real-life crimes of the first half of the nineteenth century, and how these murders were transformed into popular entertainments.

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Dr Lucy Worsley explores how real life crime, science and the emerging art of detection had an influence on the popular culture of homicide during the Victorian Age.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of America
programme.desc: Martin Clunes goes on a journey around the coast of America to discover what life is like on the surrounding islands. He travels from Hawaiis islands of fire and Alaskas islands of snow, to the playgrounds of presidents off the New England coast.

programme.title: Sue Perkins: Along The US-Mexico Border
programme.desc: Sue starts her journey at the western end of the border, in the Mexican city of Tijuana, where she tries just about every sample in a Tequila showroom and is left in no doubt that the city deserves its reputation as a party town. She also discovers an unexpected invasion of migrants: American retirees who have settled south of the border to enjoy the good life and an ocean view at an affordable price. Over on the US side of the border, Sue spends a day with Mark Lamb, sheriff of Pinal County.

programme.title: Sue Perkins: Along The US-Mexico Border
programme.desc: Sue visits the Mexican city of Juarez, essentially one half of a super-city adjoining El Paso, Texas. Here she meets people whose lives traverse the border, including Gabriela, who is bringing up her kids alone in El Paso because her husband, Adrian, is not legal in America and is stuck in Juarez. Every weekend she takes the children to the border, so they can cross into Mexico and be with their dad. But Gabriela is not allowed to cross the border until her own immigration papers are finalised.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Revealing the extraordinary riches and wonders of the polar regions that have kept people visiting them for thousands of years. Today, their survival relies on a combination of ancient wisdom and cutting-edge science. Most Arctic people live in Siberia, either in cities like Norilsk - the coldest city on earth - or out on the tundra, where tribes like the Dogan survive by herding reindeer.

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Its Christmas in the nations favourite corner shop, but some of Granvilles most important customers have plans to leave town. Not only is Madge planning to take his beloved Mavis away for a Christmas break but is Mr Newbold also thinking of doing a runner, leaving Granville at the mercy of Mrs Featherstones amorous advances? Granville has to use some of his craftiest wiles to persuade everyone not to travel at Christmas.

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Bryan gets more than he bargained for when he meets his new love and the staffs loyalties are severely tested, while Llewellyn seizes the opportunity of securing extra labour for his harvest.

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: When Mr Grainger is promoted to shop manager the power seems to go to his head and his first move is to sack Mrs Slocombe.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: When word goes around town that Old Heptonstall is looking for volunteers, Hobbo and his army of volunteers, namely Alvin and Entwistle, go and visit him without a second thought. They find that he has a bad leg and is confined to the shed, where at least he doesnt have to listen to his wifes snoring. Tearfully, Heptonstall tells them he wants to go to the churchyard and bury a very dear friend.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Its Christmas in the nations favourite corner shop, but some of Granvilles most important customers have plans to leave town. Not only is Madge planning to take his beloved Mavis away for a Christmas break but is Mr Newbold also thinking of doing a runner, leaving Granville at the mercy of Mrs Featherstones amorous advances? Granville has to use some of his craftiest wiles to persuade everyone not to travel at Christmas.

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Bryan gets more than he bargained for when he meets his new love and the staffs loyalties are severely tested, while Llewellyn seizes the opportunity of securing extra labour for his harvest.

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: When Mr Grainger is promoted to shop manager the power seems to go to his head and his first move is to sack Mrs Slocombe.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: When word goes around town that Old Heptonstall is looking for volunteers, Hobbo and his army of volunteers, namely Alvin and Entwistle, go and visit him without a second thought. They find that he has a bad leg and is confined to the shed, where at least he doesnt have to listen to his wifes snoring. Tearfully, Heptonstall tells them he wants to go to the churchyard and bury a very dear friend.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek makes his way to Blackpool to pick up what will be the highest priced item at the next auction. But, the 1970 Aston Martin DBS needs a tow to the local garage.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Over the years Derek has learnt to always expect the unexpected. So when Call the Midwife star, Cliff Parisi, drops off his Bedford CA campervan its just another day at the office.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up an impressive five vehicle haul from a collector who can no longer look after his motors. Pauls out on the road too - hes collecting a rare 1972 Lancia Fulvia Berlina.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads off to acquire some vintage motorcycles from a collection in a garage at the bottom of a garden in the North East. Meanwhile, Paul tries to bag a 1955 Ford Zephyr convertible.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave finds two rare Fiats and a VW Corrado. Meanwhile, Derek has his work cut out in Yorkshire trying to remove an old Morris that appears to be supporting a precarious garage roof.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek navigates the dry stone walls of the Peak District to collect a very original 1988 Opel Manta, Dave handles a rare Ford Granada rally support vehicle, and Paul contends with a Hilux monster truck.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek takes a long drive in a 1960s bus that has had a life in the sun, Dave helps a collector trim his fleet of British classics by taking a Triumph TR7 convertible for auction, and Paul is confused by an agricultural Bonser truck.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Homeowners across Britain try to complete do-it-yourself home projects on their own. But sometimes, they need help finishing the work. Thats where presenter Nick Knowles and his team of designers and builders step in. They help homeowners complete their DIY projects gone awry.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Jordan Hutchison is an inspirational teenager. He has cerebral palsy and epilepsy, but this has not stopped him defying expectations and raising huge sums of money for charity. He currently lives with his parents, Jackie and Colin, and his siblings at his grandmothers house. He sleeps on an air bed, while the parents share rooms with the younger children. The family home is a shell after a series of building issues meant the family ran out of money with no way of finishing the work.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A wild buzzard with a broken wing throws up new challenges for Professor Noel Fitzpatrick as he strives to save the birds life. Vicky and Brian bring in their beloved Labrador with badly damaged elbow joints. Roses pampered cat is used to enjoying the finer things in life, but now needs surgery for his slipping knee caps.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A Bengal cat, Tia, is rushed to Fitzpatrick Referrals after being hit by a car. Noel must reconstruct Tias tiny bones using a combination of rods and pins. Rescue whippet Wobble is so badly damaged that Noel has to perform a high-risk operation.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A landslip at a construction site traps a worker under tons of earth. Reports of a riot at a school come in and medic Alex must lead the operation to treat the injured.

programme.title: Body on the Beach: What Happened to Annie?
programme.desc: Within hours of Annie Borjessons body being found on a Scottish beach, her family are told it is suicide. However, they believe the evidence points to murder.

programme.title: Body on the Beach: What Happened to Annie?
programme.desc: Hazel pieces together the mysterious final hours before Annie was found dead. She hears an extraordinary theory that Annies death was a state-sponsored hit job.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Janine and Adam assist a woman who is threatening to jump out of a first-floor window, and husband and wife team Ann and Kevin are called out to help Anns sick Dad!

programme.title: Deepfake Porn: You Could Be Next
programme.desc: Most people think of deepfakes as manipulated video clips of world leaders, designed to create confusion, but the most pressing threat of deepfakes is not politics, but porn. Research shows around 96 per cent of deepfake videos are pornographic, with almost 100 per cent of them involving non-consenting women. The film features three women who have been impacted by this form of image-based sexual abuse.

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out
programme.desc: Stacey Solomon and her gang - organizer Dilly, carpenter Rob and cleaner Iwan - challenge the Harris-Hawley family to sort their lives out in seven days. They ask the family to try to let go of half their possessions so that the team can then beautifully reorganise their home. Stacey gets to know the family behind the clutter - childhood sweethearts Dan and Char and their two daughters, Mia (11) and Cece (3) - who rent a two-up, two-down from their local council.

programme.desc: When a phone with a brutal drowning recorded on it is handed in to MHU headquarters, the pressure is on for Annika and the team to track down the murderer.

programme.desc: Paramedics in Portsmouth attend a man with a mechanical heart valve and a dangerously fast pulse, while in Oxford, crews treat a student having an asthma attack.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: In Portsmouth, the paramedics treat a woman who was kicked by a horse and a baby with breathing problems, while in Oxford, crews attend an elderly priest with abdominal pain.

programme.title: Katie Piper: Locked Up in Louisiana
programme.desc: Katie meets Kia, who is accused of attempted murder after shooting a man while working as a security guard. She claims it was self-defence, but Katie questions if she used reasonable force.

programme.title: Amber: The Girl Behind the Alert
programme.desc: For the first and last time, Amber Hagermans mother details her daughters shocking murder and shares chilling documentary footage that captures the 9-year-olds final days; Ambers legacy is an alert system that has saved over a thousand children.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo arrives in Fishbourne, west of Chichester, the place where the Romans are believed to have first landed on British shores.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael takes a pot shot at the sport of kings at a country estate, where the king dallied with his mistress. He learns the ropes aboard an Edwardian wherry on the Norfolk Broads and joins variety performers to tap dance on Cromer Pier. In Cambridge, he investigates the student days of the young Prince of Wales and the novelist, E. M. Forster, author of `Howards End.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo retraces the journeys featured in George Bradshaws Continental Railway Guide. Leaving London behind, armed with his 1913 guide, Michael follows the most popular route of the Edwardian traveller through France. His first stop is Paris where he absorbs the atmosphere of La Belle Epoque, before he travels south to the Cote DAzur. He then ends his journey at Monte Carlos gaming tables.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek thinks a 29,000-mile Ford Capri should be kept original. Plus, a Hercules womens racing bike from the 50s.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek picks out a solid-looking 1969 MGB for the team to look out for at auction. After winning it is sent to a father-and-son team to restore.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Life on the British Home Front is a time of gas masks, digging for victory, evacuation and the Squander Bug. The Luftwaffe redirect their bombing raids to provincial cities and U-boat operations in the Atlantic mean that food supplies are scarce.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The SAS War Crimes Investigation Team attempt to pinpoint the whereabouts of several Gestapo officers, wanted for a host of despicable atrocities.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Roundhay Park in Leeds, highlights include a rare Rolex Sea-Dweller watch, a gold handbag that was left in a safety deposit box by an anonymous benefactor, and an album of rare Antarctic photos.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Alexandra Gardens in Cardiff, highlights include some surprisingly valuable jewellery found at car boot sales, a jacket made by the Ojibwe people in Canada, and original illustrations of Peter Rabbit by Beatrix Potter.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A super low mileage Renault Dauphine proves irresistible to the Resto team... But its 1959 mechanics ensure some hefty bills.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team, including Andy Joynson, buy the right kind of Land Rover, but its got the wrong engine. Can they clean up its emissions with a modern motor?

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Life on the British Home Front is a time of gas masks, digging for victory, evacuation and the Squander Bug. The Luftwaffe redirect their bombing raids to provincial cities and U-boat operations in the Atlantic mean that food supplies are scarce.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The SAS War Crimes Investigation Team attempt to pinpoint the whereabouts of several Gestapo officers, wanted for a host of despicable atrocities.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at the worlds great plains - immense wilderness areas that seem empty, but which support the greatest gatherings of wildlife on earth, including two million gazelles on the Mongolian steppes, and three million caribou in North America. At the heart of all this is single living thing - grass - able to survive the baking savannahs of Africa, the frozen tundra of the Arctic, and the Indian floodplains.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals the greatest woodlands on earth, from the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the equator. The Taiga forest is a silent world of stunted conifers cloaked in snow and ice. By contrast, the broadleaf forests of North America and Europe bustle with life, while the baobab forests of Madagascar are the strangest of all, with bizarre upside-down trees.

programme.desc: Derek waxes lyrical about a pristine Jaguar XJ8 and a Ford Model T van tests his driving skills.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores the once great empire of Austria-Hungary, domain of the famous Habsburg monarchs. Starting in Budapest, he travels via Bratislava in Slovakia, to the beautiful and elegant city of Vienna where he immerses himself in pre-war decadence. From there he travels to Salzburg, before heading to the magnificent scenery of the Salzkammergut region.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: This time, Michael Portillo begins this journey in Berlin, the capital of Germany, which at the beginning of the 20th century was a powerhouse of science and technology. Led by his 1913 railway guide, he then heads west via the picturesque Harz Mountains to the industrial Ruhr Valley to learn how imperial Germany was war ready. He then travels south along the tourist trail of the castle studded Rhein.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Dave alerts the team to a 1979 Lotus Esprit S3. The car is a thoroughbred classic that desperately needs a proper restoration, but its also an expensive purchase that risks not paying off.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The Restoring Classics team pays tribute to mid-80s Midlands by breathing new life into what was once the fastest production MG ever made: the Montego Turbo.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Germanys initial triumphs lose momentum as the tide of the war turns in favour of the Allies. Internal opposition to the Reich culminates in an assassination plot.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The man responsible for the massacre of US soldiers in Malmedy, Joachim Peiper, becomes the hunted as Allied forces attempt to track him down.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Crystal Palace Park in Southeast London, treasures include a signed Paul McCartney cartoon, a portrait of Queen Elizabeth II made out of Lego bricks, and some valuable vintage Vivienne Westwood outfits.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow comes from Ebrington Square in Derry/Londonderry in the west of Northern Ireland, where Lennox Cato discovers a table made from the gifts bestowed by a Chinese emperor, while a stunning amethyst pendant catches Susan Rumfitts eye.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a North Yorkshire-based, family-run historic car auction business, which uncovers some remarkably rare vehicles in Thornton-le-Dale.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A rare 1980s Sierra Cosworth draws in a crowd of Ford fans, while a restorer delights buyers with his 1966 Sunbeam Rapier and Sarah takes a shine to a caravan.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Germanys initial triumphs lose momentum as the tide of the war turns in favour of the Allies. Internal opposition to the Reich culminates in an assassination plot.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The man responsible for the massacre of US soldiers in Malmedy, Joachim Peiper, becomes the hunted as Allied forces attempt to track him down.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Tropical rainforests cover just 3 per cent of our planet yet are home to a huge 50 per cent of the worlds species. They are the richest environments on earth but also the most competitive. Travelling through this enchanted world we uncover the amazing strategies the inhabitants adopt in order to survive. Look out for the flying frog mating orgy and the sinister bodysnatching Cordyceps fungi that eat their victims alive.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates the epic journey of a humpback whale and calf as they cross the richest seas that fringe our coasts. From tropical paradises, where the newborn calf takes his first faltering breaths, to the storm-ravaged icy polar seas, the whales great feeding grounds, seas of great contrast and surprise are revealed.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The adventures of a family run crew of heavy-haulage specialists as they race to transport the heaviest, longest and most precious locomotives around the world by road, rail and sea. Plus, footage reveals the history behind the featured locomotives.

programme.title: Trawlermen: Hunting the Catch
programme.desc: Its the last trip before Christmas and, with demand surging, fish prices are rising. Off the south coast of Cornwall, Ocean Pride is heading out in pursuit of pollock among the old sunken shipwrecks of the English Channel. 380 miles away on the Yorkshire coast, crabber Tydus is preparing to head out with hopes of a big pay day. The aim is to put six tons in the tank, a catch that this week could fetch well over £30,000.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a North Yorkshire-based, family-run historic car auction business, which uncovers some remarkably rare vehicles in Thornton-le-Dale.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A rare 1980s Sierra Cosworth draws in a crowd of Ford fans, while a restorer delights buyers with his 1966 Sunbeam Rapier and Sarah takes a shine to a caravan.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus look to make some quick cash as they fix and wrap a Toyota MR2 MK2, but it remains to be seen whether there is any money to be made from this low-spec car.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel the length of Britain seeking items to fix up and flog on to make a handsome profit for their owners. In this episode, Henry gives Simon a motorcycling masterclass in Wiltshire.

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley investigates how Georges mental illness changed Britain. She uncovers Royal papers and explores how the attempt on his life by a mentally ill subject changed psychiatry forever.

programme.title: Cuttputlli
programme.desc: In Kasauli, a serial killer dares to taunt the police force as corpses of teenage girls are found in public spaces. While trying to prevent the deaths, Inspector Arjan Shetty must trace the murderer.

programme.title: Pyaar Tune Kya Kiya
programme.desc: As an only child, Ria Jaiswal got everything she wanted. However, as a woman, she falls in love with an already married photographer and sets out to get what she wants, no matter what the consequences may be.

programme.title: Raju Chacha
programme.desc: When a father is suddenly killed, a con-man poses as their paternal uncle.

programme.title: Pyar To Hona Hi Tha
programme.desc: An attempt to make her friend Rahul fall for her backfires on Sanjana.

programme.title: Total Dhamaal
programme.desc: Six people encounter wild jungle animals and danger at every turn while racing against time to find a hidden stash of 500 million rupees.

programme.title: Humpty Sharma Ki Dulhania
programme.desc: The carefree son of a campus bookstore owner and an unattainable beauty find that their love-hate relationship is turning into all love.

programme.title: Darr
programme.desc: Beautiful college girl Kiran Awasti finds herself caught between two admirers: the dangerously obsessive Rahul Mehra and brave naval officer Sunil Malhotra. Rahul will stop at nothing to win Kiran - even murder - but she is already engaged to Sunil and, following their marriage, the battle between love and life intensifies with frightening consequences.

programme.desc: Naina, a school teacher, takes 16 students hostage. Rattling the police and the leaders, her demands send shock waves through the country.

programme.title: Goodbye

programme.desc: Ganga Mai is a resilient woman who is deserted by her husband for not giving birth to a son. Refusing to bow to societal expectations, she devotes herself to raising her three daughters with unwavering strength, grace, and affection.
